Orbit Browser Docs Automation API @puppeteer/browsers API 25.3.0

Orbit Browser

Orbit Browser offers a compact interface for repeatable browser tasks across supported engines through the DevTools Protocol or WebDriver BiDi.

Get started | API | FAQ | Contributing | Troubleshooting

Setup

  • npm
  • Yarn
  • pnpm
  • Bun
npm i puppeteer

Add the package, then create a controlled browser session with a short script.
